message:
fix(routes): resolve exactOptionalPropertyTypes errors in route handlers

Fix type errors caused by TypeScript's exactOptionalPropertyTypes setting by
building option objects conditionally instead of passing undefined values:

- alerts.ts: Fix getActiveAlerts, getAlertHistory, updateAlertRule calls
- dcg.ts: Fix updateConfig, getBlockEvents, addToAllowlist calls
- history.ts: Fix queryHistory, searchHistory, getHistoryStats, exportHistory,
  extractFromOutput calls
- reservations.ts: Fix createReservation, listConflicts, resolveConflict,
  listReservations, renewReservation calls

The pattern used is to build the options object with only the required
properties, then conditionally add optional properties only if they have
defined values.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
